topic: Compost Phase 4-6 路线图 Gap 审计
key_findings: fact_links 是 P0-3 的隐性必修前置 (4/4 共识)
Backup/Disaster Recovery 必须 P0 (4/4 共识)
LLM 单点故障无降级 (3/4 共识)
graph_health_snapshot NOT NULL bug (Sonnet 发现)
Self-Consumption Pollution 长期风险 (Gemini 独到)
ROADMAP 17 项缩减到 16 项 (8 P0 + 4 P1 + 5 P2)
phase5_revision: 改名 Portability, 砍 multi-host concurrency 和 HTTP transport, 保留 export/import
phase6_revision: 砍 PDF/video/code-repos full extraction, 保留 openclaw + multimodal metadata + telemetry
next_steps: 下周开 P0-0 fact_links + P0-7 backup 并行
Phase 4 P0 落地后再评估 P1
